title: 用 AI 让工程团队产出翻倍：Intercom 高级首席工程师 Brian Scanlan 的 Agent-First 实战
author: AI Engineer
content:
How Building with AI Can Double the Throughput of Your Engineering Team

Intercom has long been a proponent of "shipping fast" as the heartbeat of a company. In this presentation, Brian Scanlan, a Senior Principal Engineer at Intercom, details how the 15-year-old SaaS company reinvented itself as an AI-first organization literally over the weekend ChatGPT was released.

The Pivot to AI and the 'Finn' Agent

Intercom's transformation wasn't just about adding wrappers to existing features. They launched Finn, a high-performance AI customer support agent built on GPT-4, which now serves over 8,000 customers and resolves millions of queries weekly. This external success mirrored an internal push to revolutionize how the company builds software.

The '2X' Mission

In mid-2023, Intercom set a target that many considered wildly ambitious: doubling the engineering throughput within a single year.

  • Metric: They chose "code changes per R&D person" as their primary measure of productivity.
  • Strategy: They moved away from a fragmented landscape of various AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Augment) to standardize on the Claude platform.
  • Logic: By centralizing on one platform, the team could build "compounding benefits," connecting Claude to every internal system, database, and engineering convention used at Intercom.

Leadership and Cultural Standards

Scanlan emphasizes that such a massive shift requires more than just new tools—it requires an organizational mandate. Intercom updated job descriptions to make AI adoption a baseline requirement for all roles. They also established Team 2X, a dedicated group tasked with building internal plugins and "skills" for Claude that encapsulate Intercom's specific architectural patterns and security rules.

Moving Up the Stack

Scanlan compares the current AI revolution to the shift from physical data centers to the cloud. Just as systems administrators evolved into SREs focusing on automation, modern engineers must move "up the stack" to act as orchestrators for agents.

One of the most significant breakthroughs mentioned is automated code reviews. By back-testing and labeling data, Intercom achieved a high-confidence automated approval process for safe, simple pull requests. Remarkably, they have maintained compliance with SOC 2 and ISO standards without requiring human intervention for these specific automated approvals.

Real-World Impact

The results of this initiative are striking:

  1. Doubled Throughput: Intercom reached their 2X goal ahead of schedule after the full rollout of Claude Code in early 2024.
  2. Autonomous Incident Response: AI agents can now handle tasks like security incident analysis—triaging leaked metadata and suggesting next steps—in minutes rather than the 20-30 minutes it would take a human.
  3. Technical Debt Reduction: Specialized AI skills now automatically fix "flaky" test specs, a task usually reserved for senior Rails engineers.

Scanlan concludes that the future of engineering likely involves the merging of product management, design, and engineering into highly efficient, AI-augmented teams. For organizations looking to keep pace, the message is clear: standardization, automation, and a mandate for AI adoption are no longer optional.
aiSummary: Intercom 高级首席工程师 Brian Scanlan 分享如何通过强制推行 AI、统一收敛到 Claude Code，并沉淀可复用的内部 skill 库，在不到一年内把工程 PR 吞吐量翻倍。
oneSentenceSummary: Intercom 高级首席工程师 Brian Scanlan 分享如何通过强制推行 AI、统一收敛到 Claude Code，并沉淀可复用的内部 skill 库，在不到一年内把工程 PR 吞吐量翻倍。
summary: 在这场 AI Engineer 大会演讲中，Brian Scanlan 详细复盘了 Intercom 在 ChatGPT 发布后全公司转向 AI-first 的推进过程。管理层只定了一个硬指标——「人均 R&D 代码变更数」，并公开承诺一年内做到 2X。落地打法围绕三步：第一是自上而下的文化变革，岗位说明书直接写明「不采用 AI 即不达预期」，同时成立专职的 Team 2X；第二是平台收敛，放弃过去对各类编辑器一视同仁的策略，全面押注 Claude 与 Claude Code，并把它接入公司内部所有系统、约定和架构模式；第三是 agent-first 工程原则，工程师必须「向上一层」工作，把工作流沉淀为颗粒度小、可回归测试、长期可用的 skill，并用历史数据做 back-testing 验证。Scanlan 给出了硬核内部数据：PR 吞吐量提前完成翻倍目标，约 17.6% 的代码审批已实现完全自动化，且在 SOC 2、ISO 27001、HIPAA 合规框架下无需 human-in-the-loop；专门的 skill 已能自动修复 flaky 的 Rails 测试，并在数分钟内独立处置真实安全事件。他把这一波变革类比为当年 sysadmin 向 SRE 的转型，只不过这次是整个行业以 100 倍速度同时发生。

mainPoints.point: 锁定一个硬性产出指标，并公开承诺翻倍
mainPoints.explanation: Intercom 把「人均 R&D 代码变更数」选定为唯一的吞吐量指标，并设定一年内做到 2X。一个明确的数字，加上开发者满意度调研与 DX 工具作为辅助信号，让整个组织聚焦在同一方向上，进展也变得可度量。

mainPoints.point: 自上而下强制采用 AI，并配齐专职推动团队
mainPoints.explanation: 岗位说明书被改写：任何角色只要不采用 AI，就直接判定为「不达预期，二元判定」。公司同时为数百人的 R&D 团队投入了全职的 Team 2X，专门做内部插件、skill 和 onboarding，把文化变革当成一个工程项目来推进。

mainPoints.point: 收敛到统一的 Agent 平台才能拿到复利
mainPoints.explanation: Intercom 放弃了过去同时支持 Copilot、Cursor、Augment 等多个工具的策略，全面押注 Claude Code，再把它和公司内部每一个系统、Rails 约定、React 模式和安全规则打通，让改进可以叠加复利，而不是分散在不同工具之间。

mainPoints.point: 比起自研 Agent 编排，更应该沉淀小而长寿、经过 back-testing 的 skill
mainPoints.explanation: 工程师的精力应从写应用代码转向把工作流编码成可测试的 Claude skill，并用历史数据回测验证。比如有的 skill 已经能独立修复 flaky 的 Rails 测试，另一个 skill 则在两分钟内端到端处置了真实的安全事件。

mainPoints.point: 自动化代码审批可以在 SOC 2 / ISO / HIPAA 框架下无需 human-in-the-loop
mainPoints.explanation: 通过对审批结果做 back-testing、给输出打标签、把 PR 引导向更安全简单的变更，再配合审计方梳理日志和控制项，Intercom 现在在受监管的合规体系下，已经能自动审批约 17.6% 的 PR——这反而降低了风险，而不是增加风险。

keyQuotes: 去年年中，我们定了一个非常简单的目标：把工程团队的吞吐量在一年内翻一倍。
在 Intercom，不管你是设计师、产品经理还是工程师，只要你不采用 AI，就是不达预期，二元判定。
如果你把不同的工作流分散到各种云厂商和工具上，就拿不到一个精心设计的平台所带来的复利收益。
工程师能做的每一件事，智能体都必须能做到。
你不需要 human-in-the-loop 也能拿到这些合规认证，但前提是你必须非常清楚自己在做什么。
